ANF Code¶

Given a vectorial Boolean function in the univariate form, return its algebraic normal form

 1function ANF(f)
 2R<z>:=Parent(f);
 3K<a>:=BaseRing(R);
 4n:=Degree(K);
 5 V:=VectorSpace(GF(2),n);
 6function invcorrisp(v)
 7  return K!(&+[v[i+1]*a^i : i in [0..n-1]]);
 8end function;
 9I:=Matrix(GF(2), 2^n, n, []);
10V1:=[i : i in V];
11K1:=[i : i in K];
12for k in [1..2^n] do
13z:=invcorrisp(V1[k]);
14for i in [1..2^n] do
15if Evaluate(f,z) eq invcorrisp(V1[i]) then
16I[k]:=V1[i];
17break; end if; end for; end for;
18B:=Matrix(GF(2), 2^n, 2^n, []);
19P<[x]>:=PolynomialRing(GF(2), n);
20M:=[ &*[x[i]^(Integers()!a[i]) : i in [1..n]] : a in V];
21// M = all possible monomials in n variables
22for i in [1..2^n] do
23for j in [1..2^n] do
24B[i, j]:=Evaluate(M[j], Eltseq(V1[i]));
25end for; end for;
26S:= Solution(Transpose(B) ,Transpose(I));
27pN:=[];
28for j in [1..n] do
29pn:=0;
30for i in [1..2^n] do
31pn:=M[i]*S[j][i]+pn;
32end for;
33pN:= Append (pN,pn);
34end for;
35return pN;
36end function;
